chrome-extensions.note: Trimmed to the reference files relevant to TabTwin (MV3 service worker, content scripts, message passing, popup, tabs, storage, API calling, Prompt API). Web Store publishing and unused-API references removed.

tailwind-design-system.note: Examples are Tailwind v4 CSS-first; TabTwin is on v3.4.4. SKILL.md carries a prominent v3 translation warning. Replaces the previously-listed mastra-ai tailwind-best-practices skill, which was scoped to packages/playground-ui and irrelevant here.
